name: @observer-protocol/wdk-op-policy
description: Observer Protocol delegation-credential enforcement for the Tether WDK transaction policy engine (PR #55). Ships an ALLOW+DENY policy pair as one unit — the DENY companion is mandatory and fails closed — so a WDK account verifies a signed agent mandate at the signer boundary before any write op runs.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.mjs && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run fixtures && node examples/verify-yourself.mjs
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run fixtures && node test/run.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:core-sync && npm run typecheck && npm test
